texto: Once I am aware of what has been on my mind and have established ways to respond in faith with a particular prayer, sacred word, or silence before God, my anxious thoughts lose a great deal of their power.

texto: [W]e wouldn't want to read a book about a perfect character who never struggles with character flaws, a difficult past, or interpersonal conflict. Writers can powerfully connect with readers when they venture to these thin places of pain and brokenness because readers can see themselves in the pain and want to journey from pain and struggle toward redemption or some kind of resolution.

texto: Silence doesn’t have to be a major pilgrimage into the wilderness in order to find a solitary space. Everyday tasks such as driving around town, folding laundry, preparing food, washing dishes, or taking walks can all provide a measure of solitude each day when approached with the right mindset and a commitment to shut off televisions, computers, tablets, smartphones, radios, and anything else that could interrupt silence.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ed Cyzewski sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Silence doesn’t have to be a major pilgrimage into the wilderness in order to find a solitary spa…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, silence, doesn, útil em momentos de reflexao-noturna e reflexao.

texto: When you're hounded by the shame of the past, you can turn into a pretty miserable person who is always trying to measure up and please others.
